dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8614 IH: Safe Water in Schools Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. James introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Energy and Commerce

form.official-title: To amend the Safe Drinking Water Act with respect to lead contamination in school drinking water, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Safe Water in Schools Act of 2026.

section.header: Lead contamination in school drinking water

subsection.text: Section 1464(d)(2) of the Safe Drinking Water Act (42 U.S.C. 300j–24(d)(2)) is amended by adding at the end the following:

subparagraph.text: In carrying out the grant program under subparagraph (A), the Administrator shall make grants to local educational agencies to provide certified point-of-use filtration systems described in section 1459A(b)(2)(D) at schools and child care programs under the jurisdiction of those local educational agencies—

clause.text: as a preventative measure to reduce potential exposure to lead contamination in drinking water prior to testing for such contamination, as determined appropriate by the Administrator; and
for purposes of remediation of lead contamination in drinking water under this paragraph.

subsection.text: Section 1464(d)(8) of the Safe Drinking Water Act (42 U.S.C. 300j–24(d)(8)) is amended by striking subparagraphs (A) through (E) and inserting the following:
